raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Reconnecting Communities Redevelopment Act would allow local cities and counties to form Reconnecting Communities Reinvestment Agencies.",
    "These agencies are intended to help build freeway lids, affordable housing, and public amenities in communities divided by freeways.",
    "Redevelopment was considered an important tool for economic development and affordable housing construction.",
    "The removal of Redevelopment Agencies (RDA) following the 2008 recession deprived California of a critical tool to resolve housing, infrastructure, and economic development needs.",
    "AB 2945 reestablishes Redevelopment Agencies with stronger oversight provisions, including penalties for noncompliance and requirements for public input.",
    "AB 2945 mandates that 30% of funds be dedicated to building low and moderate-income housing.",
    "The bill requires Redevelopment Agencies to be located near a freeway with a Reconnecting Communities project."
  ]
}
```
